definitions.text: Arising from the fact of being male or female; pertaining to sex or gender, or to the social relations between the sexes. .mw-parser-output .defdate{font-size:smaller}
examples: Women face sexual discrimination in the workplace.

definitions.text: Capable of sexual reproduction; sexed, sexuate.
Pertaining to sexual intercourse or other intimate physical contact.
examples: Giving oral sex is my favorite sexual act.

definitions.text: A species which reproduces by sexual rather than asexual reproduction, or a member of such a species.
A person who experiences sexual attraction, a person who has interest in or desire for sex .
